serviceIntervals.task: Rear brake pads and discs - park brake drums / shoes

serviceNotes.Engine oil & filter: Toyota North America Warranty & Maintenance Guide for 86: obtain scheduled maintenance every 7,500 miles or seven and a half months, whichever comes first; engine oil & filter are replaced on that rhythm (7,500 mi ≈ 12,070 km; 7.5 months stored as 8 months in this file).
serviceNotes.Cabin air filter: Toyota booklet: replace at specified intervals; special cases (high humidity, mountainous areas) may require 15,000-mile replacement — default 30,000 km / 24 months when no fixed km is cited for normal driving.
serviceNotes.Air filter element: Scheduled maintenance chart: first engine air filter replacement typically appears around the 30,000-mile column on the normal schedule (≈48,000 km / 30 months); inspect more often in dust per booklet notes.
serviceNotes.Spark plugs (Iridium type): Aligned to the same FA20 boxer as Subaru BRZ: North American schedules commonly specify spark plug replacement near 60,000 miles (~96,500 km); confirm in your in-service maintenance log chart.
serviceNotes.Brake and clutch fluid (DOT4): Toyota scheduled log marks brake fluid service on a repeating cycle; 24-month time basis is retained for DOT4 fluid (consistent with Toyota practice and the Subaru BRZ twin footnote).
serviceNotes.Front brake pads and discs: Inspected on each scheduled maintenance visit (7,500 mi / 7.5 months normal schedule).
serviceNotes.Rear brake pads and discs - park brake d: Inspected on each scheduled maintenance visit alongside the front axle checklist.
serviceNotes.Rear diff oil: Matched to Subaru BRZ (FA20) North American 48-month / 48,000-mile rear differential service for this shared rear-drive layout.
serviceNotes.Manual transmission oil: Matched to Subaru BRZ manual gearbox oil interval (48 months / 48,000 miles) used on the Toyota–Subaru ZN6/ZC6 platform.
serviceNotes.Engine / Heater Coolant: Toyota USA maintenance guide: engine coolant first replacement at 135,000 miles or 132 months, then every 75,000 miles or 72 months (135,000 mi ≈ 217,000 km).
serviceNotes.Fuel filter: Matched to Subaru BRZ FA20 North American fuel filter replacement at 48 months / 48,000 miles for the shared D-4S fuel system hardware.
serviceNotes.Auto transmission fluid: Booklet text: inspect or replace automatic transmission fluid at specified intervals in the log; many owners exchange near the 60,000-mile major service on this platform when fluid darkens.

serviceSources.Engine oil & filter: https://www.toyota.com/content/dam/toyota/brochures/pdf/2023/T-MMS-23_86.pdf — Toyota 86 Warranty & Maintenance Guide: maintenance every 7,500 miles or 7.5 months; engine oil & filter per scheduled log.
serviceSources.Cabin air filter: https://www.toyota.com/content/dam/toyota/brochures/pdf/2023/T-MMS-23_86.pdf — cabin air filter replacement conditions and scheduled log (86).
serviceSources.Air filter element: https://www.toyota.com/content/dam/toyota/brochures/pdf/2023/T-MMS-23_86.pdf — engine air filter inspect/replace per scheduled maintenance log (normal schedule column ~30,000 miles first replacement).
serviceSources.Spark plugs (Iridium type): https://www.toyota.com/content/dam/toyota/brochures/pdf/2023/T-MMS-23_86.pdf — spark plugs replace at specified intervals in maintenance log. https://www.kbb.com/subaru/brz/2018/spark-plug-replacement/ — BRZ FA20 twin: ~60,000-mile spark service (converted to km).
serviceSources.Brake and clutch fluid (DOT4): https://www.toyota.com/content/dam/toyota/brochures/pdf/2023/T-MMS-23_86.pdf — brake fluid per scheduled maintenance log; 24-month DOT4 cadence for time-based tracking.
serviceSources.Front brake pads and discs: https://www.toyota.com/content/dam/toyota/brochures/pdf/2023/T-MMS-23_86.pdf — brake pads and discs inspection each scheduled service (86).
serviceSources.Rear brake pads and discs - park brake d: https://www.toyota.com/content/dam/toyota/brochures/pdf/2023/T-MMS-23_86.pdf — rear brake inspection each scheduled service (86).
serviceSources.Rear diff oil: https://subarucustomersupport.powerappsportals.com/knowledgebase/article/1001834/en-us — Subaru BRZ rear differential gear oil 48 months / 48,000 miles (ZN6/ZC6 shared architecture).
serviceSources.Manual transmission oil: https://subarucustomersupport.powerappsportals.com/knowledgebase/article/1001834/en-us — Subaru BRZ transmission gear oil 48 months / 48,000 miles (manual).
serviceSources.Engine / Heater Coolant: https://www.toyota.com/content/dam/toyota/brochures/pdf/2023/T-MMS-23_86.pdf — engine coolant: first replace at 135,000 miles or 132 months, then every 75,000 miles or 72 months.
serviceSources.Fuel filter: https://subarucustomersupport.powerappsportals.com/knowledgebase/article/1001834/en-us — Subaru BRZ fuel filter 48 months / 48,000 miles (shared FA20 application).
serviceSources.Auto transmission fluid: https://www.toyota.com/content/dam/toyota/brochures/pdf/2023/T-MMS-23_86.pdf — automatic transmission fluid inspect/replace at specified intervals; preventive exchange ~60,000 miles when fluid condition warrants.
